name: bulbasaur
description: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this POKEMON.
descriptionfr: Au matin de sa vie, la graine sur son dos lui fournit les elements dont il a besoin pour grandir.

name: ivysaur
description: When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.
descriptionfr: Lorsque le bourgeon sur son dos éclot, il répand un doux parfum pour célébrer sa floraison.

name: venusaur
description: The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.
descriptionfr: Le parfum de sa fleur se fait plus pénétrant les lendemains de pluie. Cela appâte les autres Pokémon.

name: charmander
description: Obviously prefers hot places. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.
descriptionfr: La flamme de sa queue symbolise sa vitalité. Elle est intense quand il est en bonne santé.

name: charmeleon
description: When it swings its burning tail, it elevates the temperature to unbearably high levels.
descriptionfr: La nuit, la queue ardente du Reptincel brille comme une étoile dans son repaire montagneux.

name: charizard
description: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to cause forest fires unintentionally.
descriptionfr: On raconte que la flamme du Dracaufeu s’intensifie après un combat difficile.

name: squirtle
description: After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. Powerfully sprays foam from its mouth.
descriptionfr: Il se réfugie dans sa carapace et réplique en éclaboussant l’ennemi à la première occasion.

name: wartortle
description: Often hides in water to stalk unwary prey. For swimming fast, it moves its ears to maintain balance.
descriptionfr: On prétend qu’il vit 10 000 ans. Sa queue duveteuse est un symbole de longévité populaire.

name: blastoise
description: A brutal POKéMON with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high speed tackles.
descriptionfr: Les trombes d’eau projetées par les canons de sa carapace peuvent percer le métal le plus résistant.

name: caterpie
description: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.
descriptionfr: Ses antennes rouges libèrent une puanteur qui repousse l’ennemi. Il grandit par mues régulières.

name: metapod
description: This POKéMON is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.
descriptionfr: Son corps frêle est protégé par sa carapace d’acier. Il encaisse les coups durs en attendant d’évoluer.

name: butterfree
description: In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.
descriptionfr: Il raffole du nectar des fleurs. Il est capable de repérer la plus petite quantité de pollen.

name: weedle
description: Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp venomous stinger on its head.
descriptionfr: Il mange chaque jour son poids en feuilles. Il utilise l’aiguillon sur sa tête pour repousser l’ennemi.

name: kakuna
description: Almost incapable of moving, this POKéMON can only harden its shell to protect itself from predators.
descriptionfr: Il se cache sous les feuilles et les branches pour fuir les prédateurs en attendant d’évoluer.

name: beedrill
description: It has three poisonous stingers on its forelegs and its tail. They are used to jab its enemy repeatedly.
descriptionfr: Il virevolte rapidement autour de l’ennemi et frappe de son dard empoisonné avant de décamper.

name: pidgey
description: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.
descriptionfr: Ce Pokémon docile préfère éviter le combat. Toutefois, il se montre très féroce quand on l’agresse.

name: pidgeotto
description: Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this POKéMON will fiercely peck at any intruder.
descriptionfr: Il survole son vaste territoire en quête d’une proie avant de fondre sur elle toutes griffes en avant.

name: pidgeot
description: When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as MAGIKARP.
descriptionfr: En battant des ailes de toutes ses forces, Roucarnage génère une rafale à en déraciner les arbres.

name: rattata
description: Bites anything when it attacks. Small and very quick, it is a common sight in many places.
descriptionfr: D’une prudence extrême, sa nature robuste lui permet de s’adapter à tous les terrains.

name: raticate
description: It uses its whis­ kers to maintain its balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off.
descriptionfr: Ses pattes arrière lui permettent de traverser les rivières. Il est toujours en quête de nourriture.

name: spearow
description: It flaps its small wings busily to fly. Using its beak, it searches in grass for prey.
descriptionfr: Il fait battre vigoureusement ses petites ailes pour voler et cherche à manger dans l’herbe avec le bec.

name: fearow
description: With its huge and magnificent wings, it can keep aloft without ever having to land for rest.
descriptionfr: Il a assez d’énergie pour voler toute la journée avec ses grandes ailes. Il frappe de son bec acéré.

name: ekans
description: Moves silently and stealthily. Eats the eggs of birds, such as PIDGEY and SPEAROW, whole.
descriptionfr: Il se faufile dans l’herbe sans un bruit et frappe dans le dos quand sa proie s’y attend le moins.

name: arbok
description: It is rumored that the ferocious warning markings on its belly differ from area to area.
descriptionfr: Il utilise la marque sur son ventre pour intimider l’ennemi. Il étouffe l’ennemi pétrifié par la peur.

name: pikachu
description: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.
descriptionfr: Il lui arrive de remettre d’aplomb un Pikachu allié en lui envoyant une décharge électrique.

name: raichu
description: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.
descriptionfr: Il se protège des décharges grâce à sa queue qui dissipe l’électricité dans le sol.

name: sandshrew
description: Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food.
descriptionfr: Il vit sur des terres arides épargnées par la pluie. Il se roule en boule pour se protéger.

name: sandslash
description: Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll while curled up to attack or escape.
descriptionfr: Il se met en boule pour percuter l’ennemi. Ses épines aiguisées font beaucoup de dégâts.

name: nidoran-f
description: Although small, its venomous barbs render this POKéMON dangerous. The female has smaller horns.
descriptionfr: Bien qu’il rechigne à se battre, une goutte du poison sécrété par ses piquants peut s’avérer fatale.

name: nidorina
description: The female's horn develops slowly. Prefers physical attacks such as clawing and biting.
descriptionfr: Ce Pokémon dresse ses piquants en cas de danger. Ils poussent moins vite que ceux de Nidorino.

name: nidoqueen
description: Its hard scales provide strong protection. It uses its hefty bulk to execute powerful moves.
descriptionfr: Son corps est recouvert d’écailles solides. Il donnera sa vie pour secourir les petits de son terrier.

name: nidoran-m
description: Stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger its horns, the more powerful its secreted venom.
descriptionfr: Il jauge le terrain en laissant ses oreilles dépasser de l’herbe. Il se défend avec sa corne toxique.

name: nidorino
description: An aggressive POKéMON that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes a powerful venom.
descriptionfr: D’un tempérament violent, il empale l’ennemi sur sa corne qui distille un poison puissant.

name: nidoking
description: It uses its powerful tail in battle to smash, constrict, then break the prey's bones.
descriptionfr: Un coup de sa puissante queue peut briser un poteau téléphonique comme une allumette.

name: clefairy
description: Its magical and cute appeal has many admirers. It is rare and found only in certain areas.
descriptionfr: On dit que ceux qui voient danser un groupe de Mélofée sous la pleine lune connaîtront un grand bonheur.

name: clefable
description: A timid fairy POKéMON that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.
descriptionfr: Il est très farouche et se laisse rarement approcher. De plus, il détecte les sons à plus d’1 km.

name: vulpix
description: At the time of birth, it has just one tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older.
descriptionfr: Il envoie des boules de feu. Avec l’âge, ses six queues en forment de nouvelles.

name: ninetales
description: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1000-year curse.
descriptionfr: On raconte que ses neuf queues détiennent un pouvoir mystique. Il peut vivre pendant mille ans.

name: jigglypuff
description: When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.
descriptionfr: Lorsqu’il roule ses grands yeux ronds, il entonne une berceuse qui endort son auditoire.

name: wigglytuff
description: The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.
descriptionfr: Sa fourrure est d’une douceur incomparable au toucher. Il  peut gonfler en aspirant de l’air.

name: zubat
description: Forms colonies in perpetually dark places. Uses ultrasonic waves to identify and approach targets.
descriptionfr: Dépourvu d’yeux, il se repère dans l’espace grâce aux ultrasons qu’il émet avec sa bouche.

name: golbat
description: Once it strikes, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly.
descriptionfr: Ses crocs acérés et creux peuvent pénétrer la plus épaisse des peaux et sucer le sang de la victime.

name: oddish
description: During the day, it keeps its face buried in the ground. At night, it wanders around sowing its seeds.
descriptionfr: En journée, il plante ses pieds-racines dans le sol. La nuit, il se promène en semant des graines.

name: gloom
description: The fluid that oozes from its mouth isn't drool. It is a nectar that is used to attract prey.
descriptionfr: L’odeur du nectar de sa bouche est si répugnante qu’elle agresse les narines à deux kilomètres.

name: vileplume
description: It has the world’s largest petals. With every step, the petals shake out heavy clouds of toxic pollen.
descriptionfr: Ses pétales sont les plus grands du monde. Il marche en répandant un pollen extrêmement allergène.

name: paras
description: Burrows to suck tree roots. The mushrooms on its back grow by draw­ ing nutrients from the bug host.
descriptionfr: Des champignons appelés “tochukaso” poussent sur son dos. Ils évoluent avec le Paras hôte.

name: parasect
description: A host-parasite pair in which the parasite mushroom has taken over the host bug. Prefers damp places.
descriptionfr: Un champignon parasite plus gros que Parasect contrôle son corps. Il répand des spores empoisonnées.

name: venonat
description: Lives in the shadows of tall trees where it eats insects. It is attracted by light at night.
descriptionfr: Ses grands yeux sont en fait des amas d’yeux minuscules. La nuit, il est attiré par la lumière.

name: venomoth
description: The dustlike scales covering its wings are color-coded to indicate the kinds of poison it has.
descriptionfr: Il répand ses écailles poudreuses en battant des ailes. Elles sont toxiques au toucher.

name: diglett
description: Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground.
descriptionfr: Un Pokémon qui vit sous terre. Habitué aux souterrains, il fuit la lumière du jour.

name: dugtrio
description: A team of DIGLETT triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.
descriptionfr: Ses trois têtes creusent le sol à tour de rôle. Il peut atteindre des profondeurs de 100 kilomètres.

name: meowth
description: It washes its face regularly to keep the coin on its forehead spotless. It doesn’t get along with Galarian Meowth.
descriptionfr: Son regard s’anime à la vue d’un objet brillant. C’est un Pokémon nocturne.

name: persian
description: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.
descriptionfr: Un Pokémon très snob. La taille du joyau qui orne son front alimente bien des débats parmi ses fans.

name: psyduck
description: While lulling its enemies with its vacant look, this wily POKéMON will use psychokinetic powers.
descriptionfr: Ses pouvoirs déconcertants et mystérieux lui font subir de constantes migraines.

name: golduck
description: Often seen swim­ ming elegantly by lake shores. It is often mistaken for the Japanese monster, Kappa.
descriptionfr: Ses membres palmés et son corps parfaitement adapté font de lui un nageur exceptionnel.

name: mankey
description: Extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment then thrashing away the next instant.
descriptionfr: Ils vivent en colonies sylvestres. Quand un Férosinge s’énerve, toute la colonie suit son exemple.

name: primeape
description: Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until it is caught.
descriptionfr: Il grogne quand on le toise, rugit quand on s’enfuit et devient fou de rage quand on le frappe.

name: growlithe
description: Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.
descriptionfr: Un Pokémon très loyal. Il restera immobile jusqu’à ce que son Dresseur lui donne un ordre.

name: arcanine
description: A POKéMON that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.
descriptionfr: Son port altier et son attitude fière ont depuis longtemps conquis le cœur des hommes.

name: poliwag
description: Its newly grown legs prevent it from running. It appears to prefer swimming than trying to stand.
descriptionfr: Sa peau est si mince qu’on voit ses organes internes. Il tient à peine sur ses nouveaux pieds.

name: poliwhirl
description: Capable of living in or out of water. When out of water, it sweats to keep its body slimy.
descriptionfr: La spirale qui orne son ventre ondule doucement. Celui qui la fixe est saisi d’une étrange torpeur.

name: poliwrath
description: An adept swimmer at both the front crawl and breast stroke. Easily overtakes the best human swimmers.
descriptionfr: Il possède de sacrés biscoteaux. Il peut parcourir sans relâche l’Océan Pacifique.

name: abra
description: Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and TELEPORT to safety.
descriptionfr: L’utilisation de ses pouvoirs mentaux le fatigue tellement qu’il dort 18 heures par jour.

name: kadabra
description: It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches just by being close by.
descriptionfr: Il fixe sa cuillère d’argent afin de concentrer son esprit et d’émettre un maximum d’ondes alpha.

name: alakazam
description: Its brain can out­ perform a super­ computer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5,000.
descriptionfr: On dit que les cuillères qu’il tient en permanence ont été créées par la puissance de son esprit.

name: machop
description: Loves to build its muscles. It trains in all styles of martial arts to become even stronger.
descriptionfr: Malgré sa petite taille, sa force lui permet de soulever plusieurs Racaillou à la fois.

name: machoke
description: Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power save belt to be able to regulate its motions.
descriptionfr: Il soulève les plus lourdes charges avec plaisir et facilité. Il donne un coup de main tout en s’entraînant!

name: machamp
description: Using its heavy muscles, it throws powerful punches that can send the victim clear over the horizon.
descriptionfr: La puissance et la rapidité de ses quatre bras puissants font des ravages sur ses adversaires.

name: bellsprout
description: A carnivorous POKéMON that traps and eats bugs. It uses its root feet to soak up needed moisture.
descriptionfr: Il préfère les climats chauds et humides. Ses lianes peuvent capturer une proie en un clin d’œil.

name: weepinbell
description: It spits out POISONPOWDER to immobilize the enemy and then finishes it with a spray of ACID.
descriptionfr: Un Pokémon végétal. Il capture les proies étourdies en les endormant à l’aide d’une poudre toxique.

name: victreebel
description: Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.
descriptionfr: Sa bouche sécrète un fluide à l’odeur de miel, qui s’avère être un acide extrêmement corrosif.

name: tentacool
description: Drifts in shallow seas. Anglers who hook them by accident are often punished by its stinging acid.
descriptionfr: Presque entièrement composé d’eau, son corps a tendance à se dessécher sur la terre ferme.

name: tentacruel
description: The tentacles are normally kept short. On hunts, they are extended to ensnare and immobilize prey.
descriptionfr: Ses 80 tentacules lui permettent d’emprisonner ses adversaires dans un redoutable filet venimeux.

name: geodude
description: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step or trip on them.
descriptionfr: Au repos, rien ne le distingue d’un vulgaire caillou. Malheur à ceux qui lui marchent dessus par mégarde!

name: graveler
description: Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction.
descriptionfr: Il dévale les montagnes pour se déplacer. Une fois qu’il a pris tout son élan, dur dur de l’arrêter!

name: golem
description: Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without damage.
descriptionfr: Aucun explosif ne pourrait entamer sa carapace de pierre. Il mue une fois par an.

name: ponyta
description: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything completely flat in little time.
descriptionfr: Chancelantes à la naissance, ses pattes deviennent très vite sûres et solides à force de galoper.

name: rapidash
description: Very competitive, this POKéMON will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it.
descriptionfr: Au grand galop, sa crinière de feu disperse au vent une myriade d’étincelles ardentes.

name: slowpoke
description: Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes 5 seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.
descriptionfr: Bien que lent, c’est un pêcheur adroit qui utilise sa queue. Elle est insensible aux morsures.

name: slowbro
description: The SHELLDER that is latched onto SLOWPOKE's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps.
descriptionfr: Ce grand benêt connaît des éclairs de lucidité lorsque le Kokiyas de sa queue se met à mordre.

name: magnemite
description: Uses anti-gravity to stay suspended. Appears without warning and uses THUNDER WAVE and similar moves.
descriptionfr: Plus la rotation de ses extrémités est rapide, plus la force du champ magnétique qu’il génère est grande.

name: magneton
description: Formed by several MAGNEMITEs linked together. They frequently appear when sunspots flare up.
descriptionfr: Des groupes apparaissent si des taches solaires couvrent le soleil. Ils brouillent les télévisions.

name: farfetchd
description: The sprig of green onions it holds is its weapon. It is used much like a metal sword.
descriptionfr: Il ne peut pas vivre sans son légume, c’est pourquoi il le protégera au péril de sa vie.

name: doduo
description: A bird that makes up for its poor flying with its fast foot speed. Leaves giant footprints.
descriptionfr: Ses deux cerveaux semblent communiquer leurs émotions grâce à un lien télépathique.

name: dodrio
description: Uses its three brains to execute complex plans. While two heads sleep, one head stays awake.
descriptionfr: Quand Doduo connaît cette étrange évolution, l’une de ses têtes se dédouble. Il atteint les 60 km/h.

name: seel
description: The protruding horn on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick ice.
descriptionfr: Un habitant des icebergs. En mer, il utilise la corne sur sa tête pour briser la banquise.

name: dewgong
description: Stores thermal energy in its body. Swims at a steady 8 knots even in intensely cold waters.
descriptionfr: Son corps est couvert d’un grand manteau blanc qui, dans la neige, le dissimule aux yeux des prédateurs.

name: grimer
description: Appears in filthy areas. Thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.
descriptionfr: Il est né d’un torrent de boue exposé aux rayons X de la lune. Il vit dans les ordures.

name: muk
description: Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.
descriptionfr: Son corps exsude un fluide toxique qui tue instantanément les plantes et les arbres au contact.

name: shellder
description: Its hard shell repels any kind of attack. It is vulnerable only when its shell is open.
descriptionfr: Il nage à reculons en ouvrant et en refermant ses deux coquilles. Il laisse traîner sa large langue.

name: cloyster
description: When attacked, it launches its horns in quick volleys. Its innards have never been seen.
descriptionfr: Il se défend en fermant sa coquille et projette des piquants qui repoussent ses agresseurs.

name: gastly
description: Almost invisible, this gaseous POKéMON cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice.
descriptionfr: Son corps composé de gaz toxique pourrait asphyxier n’importe qui en quelques secondes.

name: haunter
description: Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from an­ other dimension.
descriptionfr: Il adore se tapir dans l’ombre et faire frissonner ses proies en leur touchant l’épaule.

name: gengar
description: Under a full moon, this POKéMON likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.
descriptionfr: Si vous croisez un regard inquiétant qui perce la nuit, c’est sûrement un Ectoplasma.

name: onix
description: As it grows, the stone portions of its body harden to become similar to a diamond, but colored black.
descriptionfr: Il se nourrit des pierres qu’il rencontre en creusant le sol. Il peut creuser à 80 km/h!

name: drowzee
description: Puts enemies to sleep then eats their dreams. Occasionally gets sick from eating bad dreams.
descriptionfr: Son grand nez lui permet de lire les rêves d’autrui. Il adore les songes amusants.

name: hypno
description: When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of PSI moves such as HYPNOSIS and CONFUSION.
descriptionfr: La vue de son pendule oscillant endort en trois secondes, même quand on vient de se réveiller.

name: krabby
description: Its pincers are not only powerful weapons, they are used for balance when walking sideways.
descriptionfr: Il creuse son terrier sur des plages sablonneuses. Ses pinces repoussent si on les brise.

name: kingler
description: The large pincer has 10000 hp of crushing power. However, its huge size makes it unwieldy to use.
descriptionfr: Sa grande pince possède une puissance de 10 000 chevaux. Son poids la rend difficile à manier.

name: voltorb
description: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a POKé BALL, they have zapped many people.
descriptionfr: Il ressemble à une Poké Ball. Ce Pokémon dangereux peut exploser ou s’électrifier au toucher.

name: electrode
description: It stores electric energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.
descriptionfr: Il se laisse porter par les vents lorsque son corps est gonflé d’électricité à en éclater.

name: exeggcute
description: Often mistaken for eggs. When disturbed, they quickly gather and attack in swarms.
descriptionfr: Ces six œufs communiquent par télépathie. Ils peuvent se réunir rapidement si on les sépare.

name: exeggutor
description: Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an EXEGGCUTE.
descriptionfr: On l’appelle “jungle sur pattes”. Si une tête devient trop grosse, elle tombe et produit un Noeunoeuf.

name: cubone
description: Because it never removes its skull helmet, no one has ever seen this POKéMON's real face.
descriptionfr: Il pleure en pensant à sa mère disparue, et ses larmes résonnent dans son crâne creux.

name: marowak
description: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.
descriptionfr: Ce Pokémon sauvage possède des os depuis sa naissance. Il s’en sert pour combattre avec dextérité.

name: hitmonlee
description: When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra long, loping strides.
descriptionfr: Ses pattes élastiques s’allongent, ce qui ne manque jamais de surprendre au premier combat.

name: hitmonchan
description: While apparently doing nothing, it fires punches in lightning fast volleys that are impossible to see.
descriptionfr: Même le béton cède sous ses  poings dévastateurs. Au combat, il s’essouffle au bout de 3 minutes.

name: lickitung
description: Its tongue can be extended like a chameleon's. It leaves a tingling sensation when it licks enemies.
descriptionfr: Quand il déploie sa langue de près de deux mètres, sa queue s’agite. Elles seraient reliées entre elles.

name: koffing
description: Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning.
descriptionfr: Il flotte en retenant des gaz plus légers que l’air. Ceux-ci sont explosifs, en plus d’être fétides.

name: weezing
description: Where two kinds of poison gases meet, 2 KOFFINGs can fuse into a WEEZING over many years.
descriptionfr: Il grandit en absorbant les gaz des détritus. Des triplés existent, bien qu’ils soient fort rares.

name: rhyhorn
description: A POKéMON with a one-track mind. Once it charges,  it won't stop running until it falls asleep.
descriptionfr: Ses puissantes charges pourraient démolir n’importe quel bâtiment. Dommage qu’il soit stupide.

name: rhydon
description: Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3,600 degrees.
descriptionfr: La station debout a libéré ses pattes avant et l’a rendu plus intelligent, mais il est distrait.

name: chansey
description: A rare and elusive POKéMON that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to get it.
descriptionfr: Ce Pokémon très serviable distribue ses œufs hautement nutritifs aux humains et Pokémon blessés.

name: tangela
description: The whole body is swathed with wide vines that are similar to sea­ weed. Its vines shake as it walks.
descriptionfr: Il se cache derrière des lianes bleues recouvertes d’un fin duvet. Il est chatouilleux.

name: kangaskhan
description: The infant rarely ventures out of its mother's protective pouch until it is 3 years old.
descriptionfr: Il élève ses petits dans sa poche ventrale. Il attend d’être en lieu sûr pour les laisser jouer dehors.

name: horsea
description: Known to shoot down flying bugs with precision blasts of ink from the surface of the water.
descriptionfr: Il niche à l’ombre du corail. Quand il se sent menacé, il disparaît dans un nuage d’encre opaque.

name: seadra
description: Capable of swim­ ming backwards by rapidly flapping its wing-like pectoral fins and stout tail.
descriptionfr: Son épine dorsale le protège. Ses os et ses nageoires sont très prisés en médecine traditionnelle.

name: goldeen
description: Its tail fin billows like an elegant ballroom dress, giving it the nickname of the Water Queen.
descriptionfr: Malgré son élégance quand il nage, ses coups de corne sont redoutables.

name: seaking
description: In the autumn spawning season, they can be seen swimming powerfully up rivers and creeks.
descriptionfr: En automne, à la saison des amours, il fait des réserves de graisse et arbore des couleurs chatoyantes.

name: staryu
description: If its body is torn, it can grow back if the red core remains. The core flashes at midnight.
descriptionfr: Même amoché, son corps se régénère tant que le noyau rouge est intact. Le noyau s’illumine à minuit.

name: starmie
description: Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people value the core as a gem.
descriptionfr: Un noyau rouge trône en son centre. Il envoie des signaux radio mystérieux vers le ciel nocturne.

name: mr-mime
description: If interrupted while it is miming, it will slap around the offender with its broad hands.
descriptionfr: En modifiant les molécules de l’air du bout de ses doigts, il parvient à créer un mur invisible devant lui.

name: scyther
description: With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one.
descriptionfr: À force de trancher des objets solides, les faux de ses bras sont très aiguisées.

name: jynx
description: It seductively wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.
descriptionfr: Son cri ressemble à des paroles humaines. Mais nul n’est jamais parvenu à les comprendre.

name: electabuzz
description: Normally found near power plants, they can wander away and cause major blackouts in cities.
descriptionfr: Il fait tournoyer ses bras pour donner de la force à ses coups. Profitez-en pour filer!

name: magmar
description: Its body always burns with an orange glow that enables it to hide perfectly among flames.
descriptionfr: Quand il respire profondément, des vagues de chaleur émanent de son corps et le rendent difficile à voir.

name: pinsir
description: If it fails to crush the victim in its pincers, it will swing it around and toss it hard.
descriptionfr: Il serre les proies dans ses pinces pour les trancher en deux. S’il n’y arrive pas, il les jette au loin.

name: tauros
description: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.
descriptionfr: Après avoir choisi sa cible, il fonce dessus tête baissée. Il est réputé pour sa nature violente.

name: magikarp
description: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.
descriptionfr: Un vénérable Magicarpe peut franchir une montagne en utilisant Trempette. Mais c’est tout...

name: gyarados
description: Once it begins to rampage, a GYARADOS will burn everything down, even in a harsh storm.
descriptionfr: Quand il se laisse emporter par la rage, il ne se calme qu’après avoir détruit tout ce qui l’entoure.

name: lapras
description: A POKéMON that has been over­ hunted almost to extinction. It can ferry people across the water.
descriptionfr: Il aime naviguer en portant des humains et des Pokémon sur son dos. Il comprend le langage humain.

name: ditto
description: Capable of copying an enemy's genetic code to instantly transform itself into a duplicate of the enemy.
descriptionfr: Il a la capacité de modifier sa structure cellulaire pour prendre l’apparence de ce qu’il voit.

name: eevee
description: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element STONEs.
descriptionfr: Son ADN particulier lui permet de s’adapter très rapidement à son environnement.

name: vaporeon
description: Lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin which is often mistaken for a mermaid's.
descriptionfr: Sa composition moléculaire est proche de celle de l’eau, ce qui lui permet de se liquéfier.

name: jolteon
description: It accumulates negative ions in the atmosphere to blast out 10000- volt lightning bolts.
descriptionfr: Face au danger, il fait appel à l’électricité pour dresser ses poils et lancer des décharges.

name: flareon
description: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees.
descriptionfr: L’air qu’il inspire est chauffé par la glande enflammée de son corps, atteignant les 1 700 °C.

name: porygon
description: A POKéMON that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.
descriptionfr: Ce Pokémon créé par des scientifiques peut arpenter librement le cyberespace.

name: omanyte
description: Although long extinct, in rare cases, it can be genetically resurrected from fossils.
descriptionfr: Un Pokémon ramené à la vie par la science à partir d’un fossile. Il peuplait autrefois les mers.

name: omastar
description: A prehistoric POKéMON that died out when its heavy shell made it impossible to catch prey.
descriptionfr: On pense que ce Pokémon a disparu parce que sa coquille en spirale était devenue trop grosse.

name: kabuto
description: A POKéMON that was resurrected from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor eons ago.
descriptionfr: On pense qu’il peuplait les plages il y a 300 millions d’années. Il est protégé par une coquille robuste.

name: kabutops
description: Its sleek shape is perfect for swim­ ming. It slashes prey with its claws and drains the body fluids.
descriptionfr: On pense que ce Pokémon est venu sur la terre ferme pour suivre l’évolution de ses proies.

name: aerodactyl
description: A Pokémon that roamed the skies in the dinosaur era. Its teeth are like saw blades.
descriptionfr: Un Pokémon qui arpentait le ciel au temps des dinosaures. Ses crocs sont pareils à des scies.

name: snorlax
description: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.
descriptionfr: Une fois le ventre plein, il est trop amorphe pour lever le petit doigt. Sautez sur son ventre!

name: articuno
description: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.
descriptionfr: Un Pokémon Oiseau légendaire. Il peut provoquer des blizzards en gelant l’humidité de l’air.

name: zapdos
description: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts.
descriptionfr: Un Pokémon Oiseau légendaire dont on dit qu’il vit dans les nuages d’orage. Il contrôle la foudre.

name: moltres
description: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.
descriptionfr: L’un des Pokémon Oiseaux légendaires. On dit que sa venue annonce l’arrivée du printemps.

name: dratini
description: Long considered a mythical POKéMON until recently when a small colony was found living underwater.
descriptionfr: On l’appelle “Pokémon mirage” en raison de sa rareté. On a découvert sa mue.

name: dragonair
description: A mystical POKéMON that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions.
descriptionfr: La météo change brusquement quand il est entouré d’une aura. On dit qu’il peuple les mers et les lacs.

name: dragonite
description: An extremely rarely seen marine POKéMON. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.
descriptionfr: On raconte qu’il vit quelque part en mer. Il guide les équipages naufragés jusqu’à la terre ferme.

name: mewtwo
description: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.
descriptionfr: Un Pokémon conçu en réorganisant les gènes de Mew. On raconte qu’il s’agit du Pokémon le plus féroce.

name: mew
description: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.
descriptionfr: Nombre de scientifiques voient en lui l’ancêtre des Pokémon car il maîtrise toutes leurs capacités.

name: chikorita
description: A sweet aroma gently wafts from the leaf on its head. It is docile and loves to soak up the sun's rays.
descriptionfr: Il jauge la température et l’humidité grâce à la feuille sur sa tête. Il raffole des bains de soleil.

name: bayleef
description: The scent of spices comes from around its neck. Somehow, sniffing it makes you want to fight.
descriptionfr: Le collier de bourgeons à son cou répand un arôme épicé qui vous donne du tonus.

name: meganium
description: The aroma that rises from its petals contains a substance that calms aggressive feelings.
descriptionfr: Son souffle a l’incroyable capacité de ranimer les plantes et les fleurs flétries.

name: cyndaquil
description: It has a timid nature. If it is startled, the flames on its back burn more vigorously.
descriptionfr: Ce Pokémon est un grand timide. Les flammes sur son dos s’intensifient lorsqu’il prend peur.

name: quilava
description: Be careful if it turns its back during battle. It means that it will attack with the fire on its back.
descriptionfr: La chaleur de ses flammes intimide l’ennemi. Elles s’intensifient lorsqu’il se prépare à combattre.

name: typhlosion
description: If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.
descriptionfr: Il attaque en projetant des flammes. Il se dissimule derrière les vagues de chaleur qu’il produit.

name: totodile
description: Its well-developed jaws are powerful and capable of crushing anything. Even its trainer must be careful.
descriptionfr: Il broie tout ce qu’il trouve avec ses mâchoires puissantes. Même son Dresseur doit s’en méfier.

name: croconaw
description: If it loses a fang, a new one grows back in its place. There are always 48 fangs lining its mouth.
descriptionfr: Quand il mord, il ne lâche pas prise avant que ses crocs se brisent. Ils repoussent par la suite.

name: feraligatr
description: When it bites with its massive and powerful jaws, it shakes its head and savagely tears its victim up.
descriptionfr: Ce Pokémon à l’air pataud est capable d’attaquer à la vitesse de l’éclair pour mordre sa proie.

name: sentret
description: A very cautious POKéMON, it raises itself up using its tail to get a better view of its surroundings.
descriptionfr: Ce Pokémon très nerveux prend appui sur sa queue pour observer ses alentours.

name: furret
description: It makes a nest to suit its long and skinny body. The nest is impossible for other POKéMON to enter.
descriptionfr: La femelle s’enroule autour des petits pour les bercer. Il accule l’ennemi grâce à sa vitesse.

name: hoothoot
description: It always stands on one foot. It changes feet so fast, the movement can rarely be seen.
descriptionfr: Il hulule chaque jour à la même heure. Dans certaines cultures, il incarne la sagesse.

name: noctowl
description: Its eyes are specially adapted. They concentrate even faint light and enable it to see in the dark.
descriptionfr: Ses yeux sont capables de voir distinctement même quand il fait très sombre.

name: ledyba
description: It is very timid. It will be afraid to move if it is alone. But it will be active if it is in a group.
descriptionfr: Il est si timide qu’il ne se déplace qu’au milieu d’un essaim. Il exprime ses émotions par l’odeur.

name: ledian
description: When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder.
descriptionfr: Il tire sa force de la lumière des étoiles. Plus il y en a et plus ses motifs dorsaux sont grands.

name: spinarak
description: It lies still in the same pose for days in its web, waiting for its unsuspecting prey to wander close.
descriptionfr: Il tisse une toile fine mais solide pour poser des pièges et se poste dans l’attente d’une proie.

name: ariados
description: It spins string not only from its rear but also from its mouth. It is hard to tell which end is which.
descriptionfr: Il attache un fil à sa proie avant de la libérer. Il s’en servira pour la retrouver, elle et ses amis.

name: crobat
description: It flies so si­ lently through the dark on its four wings that it may not be noticed even when nearby.
descriptionfr: La transformation de ses pattes en ailes a certes amélioré sa capacité à voler, mais pas à marcher.

name: chinchou
description: Chinchou blink their shining antennae at one another to claim their respective turf.
descriptionfr: Il envoie des décharges électriques positives et négatives du bout des antennes pour paralyser sa proie.

name: lanturn
description: The light it emits is so bright that it can illuminate the sea's surface from a depth of over three miles.
descriptionfr: La lumière de Lanturn surgit des profondeurs. On le surnomme “étoile des profondeurs”.

name: pichu
description: It is not yet skilled at storing electricity. It may send out a jolt if amused or startled.
descriptionfr: Les poches électriques de ses joues sont encore petites, mais risquent de l’électrocuter.

name: cleffa
description: Because of its unusual, star-like silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.
descriptionfr: On dit qu’il se déplace à dos d’étoile filante. Il se montre souvent quand on en voit.

name: igglybuff
description: It has a very soft body. If it starts to roll, it will bounce all over and be impossible to stop.
descriptionfr: Son corps est doux et élastique. Quand il commence à rebondir, on ne peut plus l’arrêter.

name: togepi
description: The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly.
descriptionfr: Il transforme les émotions positives des autres en bonheur qu’il stocke dans sa coquille.

name: togetic
description: They say that it will appear before kindhearted, car­ ing people and shower them with happiness.
descriptionfr: Il parcourt le monde pour distribuer de la joie aux êtres bons.

name: natu
description: Because its wings aren't yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always star­ ing at something.
descriptionfr: Il mange des cactus en prenant soin d’éviter les bourgeons et les épines. Il ne tient pas en place.

name: xatu
description: They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.
descriptionfr: Cet étrange Pokémon peut voir l’avenir et le passé. Il guette sans cesse la course du soleil.

name: mareep
description: If static elec­ tricity builds in its body, its fleece doubles in volume. Touching it will shock you.
descriptionfr: Sa laine fournie enfle lorsqu’il accumule de l’électricité statique. Son contact peut choquer.

name: flaaffy
description: As a result of storing too much electricity, it developed patches where even downy wool won't grow.
descriptionfr: Sa queue s’allume lorsque sa laine se charge d’électricité. Il projette des poils électrifiés.

name: ampharos
description: The tail's tip shines brightly and can be seen from far away. It acts as a beacon for lost people.
descriptionfr: Le bout de sa queue brille avec intensité. Jadis, on s’en servait pour envoyer des signaux.

name: bellossom
description: Plentiful in the tropics. When it dances, its petals rub together and make a pleasant ringing sound.
descriptionfr: À la fin de la saison des pluies, il sort danser en plein air, attiré par la chaleur du soleil.

name: marill
description: The tip of its tail, which con­ tains oil that is lighter than wa­ ter, lets it swim without drowning.
descriptionfr: Sa queue à l’extrémité remplie d’huile fait office de flotteur et lui permet de ne pas couler.

name: azumarill
description: It lives in water virtually all day long. Its body color and pattern act as camouflage that makes it tough for enemies to spot in water.
descriptionfr: Ses poumons peuvent contenir assez d’air pour lui permettre de passer une journée sous l’eau.

name: sudowoodo
description: Although it always pretends to be a tree, its composi­ tion appears to be closer to a rock than a plant.
descriptionfr: Il prend l’apparence d’un arbre pour éviter les attaques, mais il déteste l’eau et fuit la pluie.

name: politoed
description: If POLIWAG and POLIWHIRL hear its echoing cry, they respond by gather­ ing from far and wide.
descriptionfr: Il rassemble ses pairs pour les commander. Il utilise son cri  pour diriger Ptitard.

name: hoppip
description: To keep from being blown away by the wind, they gather in clusters. They do enjoy gentle breezes, though.
descriptionfr: Il dérive avec le vent. Sa présence en nombre dans les champs et les montagnes annonce le printemps.

name: skiploom
description: The bloom on top of its head opens and closes as the temperature fluc­ tuates up and down.
descriptionfr: Il fleurit lorsque les températures remontent. Il flotte dans le ciel  pour absorber les rayons du soleil.

name: jumpluff
description: Once it catches the wind, it deft­ ly controls its cotton-puff spores to float, even around the world.
descriptionfr: Poussé par les vents saisonniers, il fait le tour du globe en semant des spores de coton.

name: aipom
description: Its tail is so powerful that it can use it to grab a tree branch and hold itself up in the air.
descriptionfr: Sa queue est aussi agile que ses mains. Il vit en haut des grands arbres.

name: sunkern
description: It may drop out of the sky suddenly. If attacked by a SPEAROW, it will violently shake its leaves.
descriptionfr: Il tombe du ciel sans crier gare en matinée. On en croise énormément  l’année suivant un été froid.

name: sunflora
description: It converts sun­ light into energy. In the darkness after sunset, it closes its petals and becomes still.
descriptionfr: Les rayons du soleil lui donnent de l’énergie. Il est connu pour migrer vers les régions ensoleillées.

name: yanma
description: If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter win­ dows in the area.
descriptionfr: La vitesse de ses ailes lui permet un vol stationnaire. Il surveille ainsi tout son territoire.

name: wooper
description: This POKéMON lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.
descriptionfr: Sur la terre ferme, il couvre son corps d’un fluide toxique qui le protège de la déshydratation.

name: quagsire
description: This carefree POKéMON has an easy-going nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls.
descriptionfr: De nature placide, il a tendance à se cogner la tête contre les récifs et autres bateaux de passage.

name: espeon
description: It uses the fine hair that covers its body to sense air currents and predict its ene­ my's actions.
descriptionfr: Sa fourrure est si sensible qu’il peut détecter les vibrations de l’air et prédire le temps qu’il fera.

name: umbreon
description: When agitated, this POKéMON pro­ tects itself by spraying poisonous sweat from its pores.
descriptionfr: Quand il s’expose à la lumière de la lune, ses anneaux brillent et il obtient un mystérieux pouvoir.

name: murkrow
description: Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.
descriptionfr: Quand il est en danger, il tente de semer ses poursuivants dans les chemins montagneux.

name: slowking
description: It has incredible intellect and in­ tuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.
descriptionfr: La morsure de Kokiyas a fait de lui un génie dont l’intelligence rivalise avec celle d’un prix Nobel.

name: misdreavus
description: It likes playing mischievous tricks such as screaming and wailing to startle people at night.
descriptionfr: Il fait peur aux aventuriers en pleine nuit et se nourrit de leur frayeur.

name: unown
description: Their shapes look like hieroglyphs on ancient tab­ lets. It is said that the two are somehow related.
descriptionfr: Quand il est seul, il ne se passe rien... Mais en groupe, il semble habité par un mystérieux pouvoir.

name: wobbuffet
description: It hates light and shock. If attack­ ed, it inflates its body to pump up its counter­ strike.
descriptionfr: Il cherche désespérément à cacher sa queue noire. Certains pensent qu’elle renferme un secret.

name: girafarig
description: Its tail has a small brain of its own. Beware! If you get close, it may react to your scent and bite.
descriptionfr: La tête qu’il a sur la queue dispose de son propre cerveau et lui permet de couvrir ses arrières.

name: pineco
description: It likes to make its shell thicker by adding layers of tree bark. The additional weight doesn't bother it.
descriptionfr: Il ressemble à une pomme de pin. Sa carapace le protège des Pokémon Oiseaux qui le picorent par erreur.

name: forretress
description: Its entire body is shielded by a steel-hard shell. What lurks inside the armor is a total mystery.
descriptionfr: Il est prisonnier d’une coquille d’acier. Ses yeux vigilants sont la seule partie visible de son corps.

name: dunsparce
description: When spotted, this POKéMON escapes backward by furi­ ously boring into the ground with its tail.
descriptionfr: Son nid est un véritable labyrinthe qu’il creuse à l’aide de sa queue. Il sait à peine voler.

name: gligar
description: It flies straight at its target's face then clamps down on the star­ tled victim to inject poison.
descriptionfr: Il fend l’air et fond sur sa proie pour s’agripper à son visage et la frapper avec son dard.

name: steelix
description: It is thought its body transformed as a result of iron accumulating internally from swallowing soil.
descriptionfr: On pense que son corps s’est transformé à cause du fer contenu dans la terre dont il se nourrit.

name: snubbull
description: Although it looks frightening, it is actually kind and affectionate. It is very popular among women.
descriptionfr: Son visage horrible fait fuir les petits Pokémon. Par contre, les femmes le trouvent mignon.

name: granbull
description: It is actually timid and easily spooked. If at­ tacked, it flails about to fend off its attacker.
descriptionfr: En dépit des apparences, c’est un grand timide. Quand il s’énerve, il mord de ses énormes crocs.

name: qwilfish
description: To fire its poison spikes, it must inflate its body by drinking over 2.6 gallons of water all at once.
descriptionfr: Il envoie ses piquants empoisonnés à la ronde. Sa forme sphérique en fait un piètre nageur.

name: scizor
description: It has a steel-hard body. It intimidates foes by upraising its eye-patterned pincers.
descriptionfr: Les yeux sur ses pinces servent à intimider l’ennemi avant de passer à l’attaque.

name: shuckle
description: The BERRIES it stores in its vase-like shell decompose and become a gooey liquid.
descriptionfr: Il stocke des Baies sous sa carapace. Elles fermentent et produisent des jus délicieux.

name: heracross
description: It is usually docile, but if it is disturbed while sipping honey, it chases off the intruder with its horn.
descriptionfr: Il défend vaillamment sa réserve de miel personnelle à grand renfort de coups de corne.

name: sneasel
description: Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it sud­ denly extends the claws and startles its enemy.
descriptionfr: Ce Pokémon rusé agit parfois en équipe pour voler des œufs, l’un d’entre eux faisant diversion.

name: teddiursa
description: If it finds honey, its crescent mark glows. It always licks its paws because they are soaked with honey.
descriptionfr: Il baigne ses griffes dans le miel  pour les lécher. Chaque paire de pattes a un goût unique.

name: ursaring
description: Although it is a good climber, it prefers to snap trees with its forelegs and eat fallen BERRIES.
descriptionfr: Il marque de ses griffes les arbres de son territoire qui portent des Baies ou des fruits.

name: slugma
description: It never sleeps. It has to keep moving because if it stopped, its magma body would cool and harden.
descriptionfr: Son corps est fait de magma. S’il cesse de bouger, il refroidit et durcit.

name: magcargo
description: The shell on its back is just skin that has cooled and hardened. It breaks easily with a slight touch.
descriptionfr: Sa température corporelle avoisine les 10 000 °C. Des flammes fusent des fissures de sa coquille.

name: swinub
description: It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.
descriptionfr: Son nez très sensible détecte champignons, Baies et sources chaudes enfouis sous la glace.

name: piloswine
description: Because the long hair all over its body obscures its sight, it just keeps charging repeatedly.
descriptionfr: Il est protégé du froid mordant par son épais manteau de fourrure. Ses cornes sont formées de glace.

name: corsola
description: It continuously sheds and grows. The tip of its head is prized as a treasure for its beauty.
descriptionfr: Ses branches repoussent si elles sont brisées. Les plus belles sont offertes aux futures mamans comme porte-bonheurs.

name: remoraid
description: It has superb ac­ curacy. The water it shoots out can strike even moving prey from more than 300 feet.
descriptionfr: Son puissant jet d’eau ne manque jamais sa cible, même quand il est au fond de l’eau.

name: octillery
description: It traps enemies with its suction- cupped tentacles then smashes them with its rock-hard head.
descriptionfr: Il adore se cacher dans les fissures de la roche. Il crache parfois de l’encre sur ses proies.

name: delibird
description: It carries food all day long. There are tales about lost people who were saved by the food it had.
descriptionfr: Il dépose sa nourriture dans sa queue enroulée. Il l’offre souvent aux gens égarés en montagne.

name: mantine
description: As it majestically swims, it doesn't care if REMORAID attach to it for scavenging its leftovers.
descriptionfr: Il ignore royalement les Rémoraid qui s’accrochent à ses nageoires pour manger les restes qu’il sème.

name: skarmory
description: Its sturdy wings look heavy, but they are actually hollow and light, allowing it to fly freely in the sky.
descriptionfr: Son corps est prisonnier d’une armure dure comme l’acier, mais il vole à plus de 300 km/h.

name: houndour
description: It uses different kinds of cries for communicating with others of its kind and for pursuing its prey.
descriptionfr: Il est assez évolué pour chasser en meute et communiquer par des séries de cris modulés.

name: houndoom
description: If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.
descriptionfr: En colère, il crache des flammes contenant une toxine qui peut causer des dégâts irréversibles.

name: kingdra
description: It is said that it usually hides in underwater caves. It can create whirlpools by yawning.
descriptionfr: Chacun de ses déplacements provoque des tourbillons. Il vit dans les grottes sous-marines.

name: phanpy
description: It swings its long snout around play­ fully, but because it is so strong, that can be dan­ gerous.
descriptionfr: Il est fort malgré son aspect ramassé. Il n’a aucun mal à porter un humain adulte sur son dos.

name: donphan
description: It has sharp, hard tusks and a rugged hide. Its TACKLE is strong enough to knock down a house.
descriptionfr: Il attaque en se roulant en boule pour percuter l’ennemi. Il peut abattre une maison d’un seul coup.

name: porygon2
description: This upgraded version of PORYGON is designed for space exploration. It can't fly, though.
descriptionfr: Il a subi une mise à jour censée lui permettre d’explorer d’autres planètes... C’est un échec.

name: stantler
description: The curved antlers subtly change the flow of air to create a strange space where real­ ity is distorted.
descriptionfr: Quiconque observe ses antennes ressent une sensation étrange, comme si leur centre l’attirait.

name: smeargle
description: A special fluid oozes from the tip of its tail. It paints the fluid everywhere to mark its territory.
descriptionfr: Il marque son territoire en maniant sa queue comme un pinceau. On dénombre plus de 5 000 marques.

name: tyrogue
description: It is always bursting with en­ ergy. To make it­ self stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses.
descriptionfr: Il est réputé pour sa combativité. Il se blesse toujours en défiant des ennemis plus grands.

name: hitmontop
description: If you become enchanted by its smooth, elegant, dance-like kicks, you may get drilled hard.
descriptionfr: Il combat en tournoyant comme une toupie. La force centrifuge décuple sa puissance destructrice.

name: smoochum
description: Its lips are the most sensitive parts on its body. It always uses its lips first to examine things.
descriptionfr: Il goûte à tout du bout des lèvres. Elles gardent en mémoire ses goûts et ses dégoûts.

name: elekid
description: It rotates its arms to generate electricity, but it tires easily, so it charges up only a little bit.
descriptionfr: Un faible courant électrique circule entre ses cornes. Attention à ne pas y mettre la main!

name: magby
description: Each and every time it inhales and exhales, hot embers dribble out of its mouth and nostrils.
descriptionfr: Son sang est chaud comme du magma et la température de son corps peut atteindre 600 °C.

name: miltank
description: Its milk is packed with nutrition, making it the ultimate beverage for the sick or weary.
descriptionfr: On raconte que les enfants élevés au lait d’Écrémeuh deviennent des adultes braves et robustes.

name: blissey
description: Anyone who takes even one bite of BLISSEY's egg be­ comes unfailingly caring and pleas­ ant to everyone.
descriptionfr: Les œufs que pond Leuphorie sont un concentré de bonheur dont une bouchée suffit à apporter la joie.

name: raikou
description: The rain clouds it carries let it fire thunderbolts at will. They say that it descended with lightning.
descriptionfr: On prétend qu’il est tombé avec la foudre. Il peut lancer des éclairs grâce aux nuages sur son dos.

name: entei
description: Volcanoes erupt when it barks. Un­ able to restrain its extreme power, it races headlong around the land.
descriptionfr: On raconte qu’à chaque fois qu’il rugit, un volcan entre en éruption quelque part.

name: suicune
description: It races around the world to purify fouled water. It dashes away with the north wind.
descriptionfr: Il parcourt le vaste monde pour purifier les eaux polluées. Il accompagne le vent du nord.

name: larvitar
description: It feeds on soil. After it has eaten a large mountain, it will fall asleep so it can grow.
descriptionfr: Un Pokémon qui se nourrit de terre. Après avoir dévoré une montagne, il s’endort pour grandir.

name: pupitar
description: Its shell is as hard as sheet rock, and it is also very strong. Its THRASHING can topple a mountain.
descriptionfr: Son corps est dur comme la pierre souterraine. Il file comme une fusée en expulsant des gaz.

name: tyranitar
description: Its body can't be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies.
descriptionfr: Lorsqu’il est en colère, il abat des montagnes et enterre des fleuves. On doit alors modifier les cartes.

name: lugia
description: It is said that it quietly spends its time deep at the bottom of the sea because its powers are too strong.
descriptionfr: Il dort dans une faille des grands fonds. Ses battements d’ailes génèrent une tempête de 40 jours.

name: ho-oh
description: Legends claim this POKéMON flies the world's skies con­ tinuously on its magnificent seven- colored wings.
descriptionfr: Ses plumes possèdent sept couleurs. On prétend que sa vue apporte la joie éternelle.

name: celebi
description: This POKéMON wan­ ders across time. Grass and trees flourish in the forests in which it has appeared.
descriptionfr: Il a le pouvoir de voyager dans le temps. Cependant, on dit qu’il n’apparaît qu’en temps de paix.

name: treecko
description: TREECKO has small hooks on the bottom of its feet that enable it to scale vertical walls. This POKéMON attacks by slamming foes with its thick tail.
descriptionfr: Ses plantes de pieds sont couvertes d’épines lui permettant de marcher au mur et au plafond.

name: grovyle
description: The leaves growing out of GROVYLE’s body are convenient for camouflaging it from enemies in the forest. This POKéMON is a master at climbing trees in jungles.
descriptionfr: Il vit dans les jungles denses. Il saute de branche en branche pour approcher de sa proie.

name: sceptile
description: The leaves growing on SCEPTILE’s body are very sharp edged. This POKéMON is very agile - it leaps all over the branches of trees and jumps on its foe from above or behind.
descriptionfr: Les feuilles sur ses bras peuvent trancher des troncs épais. C’est le meilleur combattant des jungles.

name: torchic
description: TORCHIC sticks with its TRAINER, following behind with unsteady steps. This POKéMON breathes fire of over 1,800 degrees F, including fireballs that leave the foe scorched black.
descriptionfr: Ses câlins réchauffent car il renferme une fournaise. Il envoie des boules de feu à 1 000 °C.

name: combusken
description: COMBUSKEN toughens up its legs and thighs by running through fields and mountains. This POKéMON’s legs possess both speed and power, enabling it to dole out ten kicks in one second.
descriptionfr: Ce maître du coup de pied peut donner 10 coups par seconde. Ses cris aigus intimident l’ennemi.

name: blaziken
description: In battle, BLAZIKEN blows out intense flames from its wrists and attacks foes courageously. The stronger the foe, the more intensely this POKéMON’s wrists burn.
descriptionfr: Des flammes fusent de ses poignets et ses coups brûlent l’ennemi.

name: mudkip
description: The fin on MUDKIP’s head acts as highly sensitive radar. Using this fin to sense movements of water and air, this POKéMON can determine what is taking place around it without using its eyes.
descriptionfr: Il analyse le courant grâce à la nageoire sur sa tête. Il est assez fort pour soulever des rochers.

name: marshtomp
description: The surface of MARSHTOMP’s body is enveloped by a thin, sticky film that enables it to live on land. This POKéMON plays in mud on beaches when the ocean tide is low.
descriptionfr: Ses jambes robustes lui donnent un bon appui, même dans la boue. Il dort enfoui dans la saleté.

name: swampert
description: SWAMPERT is very strong. It has enough power to easily drag a boulder weighing more than a ton. This POKéMON also has powerful vision that lets it see even in murky water.
descriptionfr: Il peut traîner un grand bateau en nageant. Il assomme l’ennemi d’un grand coup de ses bras épais.

name: poochyena
description: At first sight, POOCHYENA takes a bite at anything that moves. This POKéMON chases after prey until the victim becomes exhausted. However, it may turn tail if the prey strikes back.
descriptionfr: Un Pokémon très obstiné qui poursuit sa proie jusqu’à ce qu’elle soit épuisée.

name: mightyena
description: MIGHTYENA gives obvious signals when it is preparing to attack. It starts to growl deeply and then flattens its body. This POKéMON will bite savagely with its sharply pointed fangs.
descriptionfr: Les Grahyèna forment des meutes de dix qui excellent au travail de groupe pour capturer leurs proies.

name: zigzagoon
description: ZIGZAGOON restlessly wanders everywhere at all times. This POKéMON does so because it is very curious. It becomes interested in anything that it happens to see.
descriptionfr: Il marche en zigzaguant et n’a pas son pareil pour trouver des objets dans l’herbe ou sous terre.

name: linoone
description: LINOONE always runs full speed and only in straight lines. If facing an obstacle, it makes a right-angle turn to evade it. This POKéMON is very challenged by gently curving roads.
descriptionfr: Il fonce sur sa proie à plus de 100 km/h. Mais il ne peut pas dévier sa course et loupe souvent sa cible.

name: wurmple
description: Using the spikes on its rear end,   WURMPLE peels the bark off trees and feeds on the sap that oozes out. This POKéMON’s feet are tipped with suction pads that allow it to cling to glass without slipping.
descriptionfr: Cible favorite des Pokémon Oiseaux, il tente de se protéger avec ses épines venimeuses.

name: silcoon
description: SILCOON tethers itself to a tree branch using silk to keep from falling. There,  this POKéMON hangs quietly while it awaits evolution. It peers out of the silk cocoon through a small hole.
descriptionfr: Il attend d’évoluer dans son cocon de soie accroché aux branches et se nourrit d’eau de pluie.

name: beautifly
description: BEAUTIFLY’s favorite food is the sweet pollen of flowers. If you want to see this POKéMON, just leave a potted flower by an open window. BEAUTIFLY is sure to come looking for pollen.
descriptionfr: Malgré les apparences, il est très agressif et attaque avec sa trompe quand on le dérange.

name: cascoon
description: CASCOON makes its protective cocoon by wrapping its body entirely with a fine silk from its mouth. Once the silk goes around its body, it hardens. This POKéMON prepares for its evolution inside the cocoon.
descriptionfr: Rancunier, il n’oublie aucune des attaques subies dans le cocon et se venge une fois qu’il a évolué.

name: dustox
description: DUSTOX is instinctively drawn to light. Swarms of this POKéMON are attracted by the bright lights of cities, where they wreak havoc by stripping the leaves off roadside trees for food.
descriptionfr: Il disperse un nuage de poudre toxique à chaque coup d’aile. Il aime les feuilles d’arbres urbains.

name: lotad
description: It searches about for clean water. If it does not drink water for too long, the leaf on its head wilts.
descriptionfr: Il ressemble à une plante aquatique et fait la navette pour les Pokémon qui ne savent pas nager.

name: lombre
description: It lives at the water’s edge where it is sunny. It sleeps on a bed of water grass by day and becomes active at night.
descriptionfr: C’est un mauvais plaisantin. Quand il repère un pêcheur, il tire sur sa ligne pour le déranger.

name: ludicolo
description: LUDICOLO begins dancing as soon as it hears cheerful, festive music. This POKéMON is said to appear when it hears the singing of children on hiking outings.
descriptionfr: Ses muscles se tonifient au son d’une musique entraînante. Il ne peut pas s’empêcher de danser.

name: seedot
description: SEEDOT attaches itself to a tree branch using the top of its head. It sucks moisture from the tree while hanging off the branch. The more water it drinks, the glossier this POKéMON’s body becomes.
descriptionfr: Il ressemble à un gland pendu à une branche. Il adore effrayer les autres Pokémon.

name: nuzleaf
description: NUZLEAF live in densely overgrown forests. They occasionally venture out of the forest to startle people. This POKéMON dislikes having its long nose pinched.
descriptionfr: Le son de sa flûte d’herbe déstabilise l’auditeur. Il vit au  plus profond des forêts.

name: shiftry
description: It lives quietly in the deep forest. It is said to create chilly winter winds with the fans it holds.
descriptionfr: D’un coup de sa feuille éventail, il génère des bourrasques de 30 m/s capables de souffler une maison.

name: taillow
description: TAILLOW courageously stands its ground against foes, however strong they may be. This gutsy POKéMON will remain defiant even after a loss. On the other hand, it cries loudly if it becomes hungry.
descriptionfr: Ce Pokémon téméraire n’a pas peur d’affronter des ennemis puissants. Il vole en quête de climats chauds.

name: swellow
description: SWELLOW flies high above our heads, making graceful arcs in the sky. This POKéMON dives at a steep angle as soon as it spots its prey. The hapless prey is tightly grasped by SWELLOW’s clawed feet, preventing escape.
descriptionfr: Il vole en cercle en quête d’une proie. Dès qu’il l’a repérée, il fond sur elle en un éclair.

name: wingull
description: WINGULL has the habit of carrying prey and valuables in its beak and hiding them in all sorts of locations. This POKéMON rides the winds and flies as if it were skating across the sky.
descriptionfr: Il utilise les courants ascendants pour planer en altitude. Son bec lui sert à transporter la nourriture.

name: pelipper
description: It is a messenger of the skies, carrying small Pokémon and eggs to safety in its bill.
descriptionfr: Ce messager du ciel transporte petits Pokémon et œufs dans son bec en toute sécurité.

name: ralts
description: RALTS senses the emotions of people using the horns on its head. This POKéMON rarely appears before people. But when it does, it draws closer if it senses that the person has a positive disposition.
descriptionfr: Quand ses cornes captent les ondes positives d’un Pokémon ou d’un humain, son corps se réchauffe.

name: kirlia
description: It is said that a KIRLIA that is exposed to the positive emotions of its TRAINER grows beautiful. This POKéMON controls psychokinetic powers with its highly developed brain.
descriptionfr: Quand il sent la joie de son Dresseur, il se met à danser, débordant d’énergie.

name: gardevoir
description: GARDEVOIR has the ability to read the future. If it senses impending danger to its TRAINER, this POKéMON is said to unleash its psychokinetic energy at full power.
descriptionfr: Prêt à tout pour protéger son Dresseur, il peut créer un mini trou noir par sa seule force mentale.

name: surskit
description: From the tips of its feet, SURSKIT secretes an oil that enables it to walk on water as if it were skating. This POKéMON feeds on microscopic organisms in ponds and lakes.
descriptionfr: Il semble patiner sur l’eau. Le parfum diffusé par le sommet de sa tête sert à attirer ses proies.

name: masquerain
description: MASQUERAIN intimidates enemies with the eyelike patterns on its antennas. This POKéMON flaps its four wings to freely fly in any direction - even sideways and backwards - as if it were a helicopter.
descriptionfr: Des motifs en forme d’yeux ornent ses antennes. Ses 4 ailes l’aident à voler dans toutes les directions.

name: shroomish
description: SHROOMISH live in damp soil in the dark depths of forests. They are often found keeping still under fallen leaves. This POKéMON feeds on compost that is made up of fallen, rotted leaves.
descriptionfr: Le sommet de sa tête libère des spores empoisonnées. Il est dangereux de les inhaler.

name: breloom
description: BRELOOM closes in on its foe with light and sprightly footwork, then throws punches with its stretchy arms. This POKéMON’s fighting technique puts boxers to shame.
descriptionfr: Ses petits bras s’étendent quand il donne un coup de poing. Son talent égale celui d’un boxeur pro.

name: slakoth
description: SLAKOTH lolls around for over twenty hours every day. Because it moves so little, it does not need much food. This POKéMON’s sole daily meal consists of just three leaves.
descriptionfr: Il passe le plus clair de son temps affalé. Rien qu’à le voir, on a envie de bâiller.

name: vigoroth
description: VIGOROTH is always itching and agitated to go on a wild rampage. It simply can’t tolerate sitting still for even a minute. This POKéMON’s stress level rises if it can’t be moving constantly.
descriptionfr: Son cœur bat dix fois plus vite que la normale, c’est pourquoi il ne tient pas en place.

name: slaking
description: SLAKING spends all day lying down and lolling about. It eats grass growing within its reach. If it eats all the grass it can reach, this POKéMON reluctantly moves to another spot.
descriptionfr: Le Pokémon le plus fainéant du monde. Il s’allonge pour économiser ses forces et contre-attaquer.

name: nincada
description: NINCADA lives underground for many years in complete darkness. This POKéMON absorbs nutrients from the roots of trees. It stays motionless as it waits for evolution.
descriptionfr: Il grandit sous terre et se repère grâce à ses antennes car ses yeux sont quasiment aveugles.

name: ninjask
description: NINJASK moves around at such a high speed that it cannot be seen, even while its crying can be clearly heard. For that reason, this POKéMON was long believed to be invisible.
descriptionfr: Il bouge si vite que l’œil a parfois du mal à le suivre. Ils se regroupent près de la sève des arbres.

name: shedinja
description: SHEDINJA’s hard body doesn’t move - not even a twitch. In fact, its body appears to be merely a hollow shell. It is believed that this POKéMON will steal the spirit of anyone peering into its hollow body from its back.
descriptionfr: Une carapace d’insecte laissée à l’abandon. On dit qu’il vole l’âme de celui qui regarde à l’intérieur.

name: whismur
description: Normally, WHISMUR’s voice is very quiet - it is barely audible even if one is paying close attention. However, if this POKéMON senses danger, it starts crying at an earsplitting volume.
descriptionfr: En temps normal, son cri est pareil à un murmure. Effrayé, il atteint le volume d’un avion à réaction.

name: loudred
description: LOUDRED’s bellowing can completely decimate a wood-frame house. It uses its voice to punish its foes. This POKéMON’s round ears serve as loudspeakers.
descriptionfr: L’onde de choc provoquée par son cri peut renverser un camion. Il trépigne pour augmenter sa force.

name: exploud
description: EXPLOUD triggers earthquakes with the tremors it creates by bellowing. If this POKéMON violently inhales from the ports on its body, it’s a sign that it is preparing to let loose a huge bellow.
descriptionfr: Son hurlement s’entend à 10 km à la ronde. Ses orifices émettent toutes sortes de bruits.

name: makuhita
description: MAKUHITA is tenacious - it will keep getting up and attacking its foe however many times it is knocked down. Every time it gets back up, this POKéMON stores more energy in its body for evolving.
descriptionfr: Il fortifie son corps en fonçant sur des arbres épais. Son nid est entouré d’arbres abattus.

name: hariyama
description: It has the habit of challenging others without hesitation to tests of strength. It’s been known to stand on train tracks and stop trains using forearm thrusts.
descriptionfr: Il aime mesurer sa force à celle des plus grands Pokémon. Ses coups de paume peuvent projeter un camion.

name: azurill
description: A Pokémon that lives by water. It moves quickly on land by bouncing on its big tail.
descriptionfr: Sa queue est plus rebondissante qu’une balle du même nom. C’est aussi une massue très puissante.

name: nosepass
description: NOSEPASS’s magnetic nose is always pointed to the north. If two of these POKéMON meet, they cannot turn their faces to each other when they are close because their magnetic noses repel one another.
descriptionfr: Face au danger, il se protège en augmentant son magnétisme et en attirant tout objet métallique.

name: skitty
description: SKITTY has the habit of becoming fascinated by moving objects and chasing them around. This POKéMON is known to chase after its own tail and become dizzy.
descriptionfr: Il poursuit tout ce qui bouge. On le voit parfois courir en cercle, chassant sa propre queue.

name: delcatty
description: DELCATTY prefers to live an unfettered existence in which it can do as it pleases at its own pace. Because this POKéMON eats and sleeps whenever it decides, its daily routines are completely random.
descriptionfr: Les femmes Dresseurs raffolent de sa sublime fourrure. Il ne possède pas de nid.

name: sableye
description: SABLEYE lead quiet lives deep inside caverns. They are feared, however, because these POKéMON are thought to steal the spirits of people when their eyes burn with a sinister glow in the darkness.
descriptionfr: À force de manger des gemmes, les yeux de ce Pokémon des grottes obscures sont devenus des joyaux.

name: mawile
description: MAWHILE’s huge jaws are actually steel horns that have been transformed. Its docile-looking face serves to lull its foe into letting down its guard. When the foe least expects it, MAWHILE chomps it with its gaping jaws.
descriptionfr: Ses cornes forment une grande mâchoire attachée à sa tête. Elle peut broyer des barres de fer.

name: aron
description: This POKéMON has a body of steel. To make its body, ARON feeds on iron ore that it digs from mountains. Occasionally, it causes major trouble by eating bridges and rails.
descriptionfr: Il vit habituellement au cœur des montagnes. Affamé, il dévore parfois des rails et des voitures.

name: lairon
description: LAIRON tempers its steel body by drinking highly nutritious mineral springwater until it is bloated. This POKéMON makes its nest close to springs of delicious water.
descriptionfr: Il se nourrit du minerai de fer qu’il fore. Il défend son territoire en chargeant avec son corps d’acier.

name: aggron
description: AGGRON claims an entire mountain as its own territory. It mercilessly beats up anything that violates its environment. This POKéMON vigilantly patrols its territory at all times.
descriptionfr: Il creuse des galeries à travers la pierre avec ses cornes d’acier pour trouver le fer qu’il apprécie.

name: meditite
description: MEDITITE undertakes rigorous mental training deep in the mountains. However, whenever it meditates, this POKéMON always loses its concentration and focus. As a result, its training never ends.
descriptionfr: Son entraînement d’ermite lui permet de léviter par le seul pouvoir de la méditation.

name: medicham
description: It is said that through meditation, MEDICHAM heightens energy inside its body and sharpens its sixth sense. This POKéMON hides its presence by merging itself with fields and mountains.
descriptionfr: Le jeûne lui permet de concentrer son esprit au point de déceler l’aura de ses adversaires.

name: electrike
description: ELECTRIKE stores electricity in its long body hair. This POKéMON stimulates its leg muscles with electric charges. These jolts of power give its legs explosive acceleration performance.
descriptionfr: Il améliore ses réflexes en stimulant ses muscles grâce à  l’électricité dans sa fourrure.

name: manectric
description: MANECTRIC is constantly discharging electricity from its mane. The sparks sometimes ignite forest fires. When it enters a battle, this POKéMON creates thunderclouds.
descriptionfr: Il libère l’électricité par sa crinière. Il crée un nuage d’orage pour appeler la foudre.

name: plusle
description: PLUSLE always acts as a cheerleader for its partners. Whenever a teammate puts out a good effort in battle, this POKéMON shorts out its body to create the crackling noises of sparks to show its joy.
descriptionfr: Il absorbe l’énergie des poteaux électriques et encourage ses amis avec des pompons d’étincelles.

name: minun
description: MINUN is more concerned about cheering on its partners than its own safety. It shorts out the electricity in its body to create brilliant showers of sparks to cheer on its teammates.
descriptionfr: Il encourage ses amis. Son corps produit plus d’étincelles quand il est en mauvaise posture.

name: volbeat
description: With the arrival of night, VOLBEAT emits light from its tail. It communicates with others by adjusting the intensity and flashing of its light. This POKéMON is attracted by the sweet aroma of ILLUMISE.
descriptionfr: Il communique avec ses pairs en allumant son postérieur la nuit. Il adore le doux parfum de Lumivole.

name: illumise
description: With its sweet aroma, it guides Volbeat to draw signs with light in the night sky.
descriptionfr: Il utilise son doux parfum pour aider Muciole à décrire des arabesques dans le ciel nocturne.

name: roselia
description: ROSELIA shoots sharp thorns as projectiles at any opponent that tries to steal the flowers on its arms. The aroma of this POKéMON brings serenity to living things.
descriptionfr: Plus le Rosélia est en bonne santé et plus son parfum est agréable et relaxant pour son entourage.

name: gulpin
description: Virtually all of GULPIN’s body is its stomach. As a result, it can swallow something its own size. This POKéMON’s stomach contains a special fluid that digests anything.
descriptionfr: Il est principalement composé d’un estomac dont les sucs digestifs dissolvent tout ce qu’il avale.

name: swalot
description: When SWALOT spots prey, it spurts out a hideously toxic fluid from its pores and sprays the target. Once the prey has weakened, this POKéMON gulps it down whole with its cavernous mouth.
descriptionfr: Il avale tout en une bouchée. Ses follicules sécrètent des fluides toxiques qui endorment l’ennemi.

name: carvanha
description: CARVANHA’s strongly developed jaws and its sharply pointed fangs pack the destructive power to rip out boat hulls. Many boats have been attacked and sunk by this POKéMON.
descriptionfr: Il attaque en banc quand on menace son territoire. Ses dents aiguisées peuvent couler un navire.

name: sharpedo
description: Nicknamed “the bully of the sea,” SHARPEDO is widely feared. Its cruel fangs grow back immediately if they snap off. Just one of these POKéMON can thoroughly tear apart a supertanker.
